title: Claude Cowork: The #1 Thing To Know
summary: If you're prompting #ClaudeCowork the same way you prompt #Claude Chat, you're doing it wrong. Claude Chat uses task-first language. You guide every step: "Do this first. Now format it like that." Cowork uses outcome-first language. You describe the end result and let it figure out the approach. For example, with Claude Chat: "I have 15 raw thumbnail images. What naming convention would you recommend?" You get a recommendation, then do the work yourself. With Claude Cowork on the other hand: "Rename each photo based on what's in it and sort them into subfolders by type." Two minutes later, the work is done. Share this with someone just getting started with Cowork 😁 #AI
author: Jeff Su

title: The 7 Levels of AI User (and how to level up)
summary: 🖥️ Download the free AI Agents Playbook: https://clickhubspot.com/d8ed27 More from Futurepedia: 👉 Join the fastest-growing AI education platform! Try it free and explore 20+ top-rated courses in AI: https://bit.ly/futurepediaSL Summary: There's 7 levels of AI user, each time you level up, you can improve your productivity in your life, work, or business. I walk through every level to help you understand where you're at, and exactly what to do to get to the next level. Which tools to use, which features to try, and what mindset to shift to.
